-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://help.digits.com/business-connections/digits-mcp-claude)[Privacy Policy](https://my.digits.com/legal/privacy-policy)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#e38b868f93a3878a848a9790cd808c8e)
    

Turn your Digits financials into a live data feed for Claude. Get instant answers about transactions, balances, and financial statements, or configure Claude to automate recurring tasks — weekly cash summaries, burn rate alerts, board-ready reports.

You can use Digits to:

**Ask a question:**  
"What can you help me do with Digits?"

**Explore your data:**  
"Summarize the most recent activity in Digits."
